subject: A gaunt skeletal figure draped in tattered black rags striding forward across desolate ground; trailing wisps of dark cloth and shadow billow behind it like wings as it advances toward the viewer
description: A bone-pale skeletal humanoid lurches forward across cracked, ash-strewn ground, its limbs spindly and elongated. Tattered black robes and ribbons of shadow stream behind it, suggesting motion and an unnatural insubstantiality. The figure faces the viewer head-on, head slightly tilted, with empty hollows where eyes would be. The background is a smoky, sepia-toned wasteland with the dim silhouettes of ruined gothic spires fading into haze. The palette is dominated by warm browns, muted golds, and oily blacks, with the bone-white of the skeleton standing out as the focal accent.
foreground: skeletal undead figure mid-stride with billowing black tatters
background: smoky wasteland with distant ruined gothic spires fading into haze
emotion: relentless, hollow-eyed advance; predatory forward motion
